package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "io"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "os"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for bufio_writer_missing_in_bulk_export: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: File or socket writes inside loops without visible bufio buffering.
type CaseBufioWriterMissingInBulkExportDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseBufioWriterMissingInBulkExportModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseBufioWriterMissingInBulkExportRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseBufioWriterMissingInBulkExportModel
}

type CaseBufioWriterMissingInBulkExportService struct {
    repo *CaseBufioWriterMissingInBulkExportRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseBufioWriterMissingInBulkExportAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveBufioWriterMissingInBulkExport(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseBufioWriterMissingInBulkExportDTO) error {
    out, _ := os.CreateTemp("", "bulk-export-*.csv")
    if out == nil {
        return nil
    }
    defer os.Remove(out.Name())
    defer out.Close()

    for _, item := range items {
        _, _ = out.WriteString(item.ID + "," + item.Status + "\n")
    }
    return nil
}
